allow: PowerShell($nb = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\usuario\\Downloads\\MultiAgentApplication-Overcooked\\multi-agent-implementation.ipynb" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $i=0; $nb.cells | ForEach-Object { $first = if \($_.source.Count -gt 0\) { \($_.source[0] -replace "`n",""\).Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(70, $_.source[0].Length\)\) } else { "" }; Write-Output \("{0,3} | {1} | {2,-10} | {3}" -f $i, $_.id, $_.cell_type, $first\); $i++ })
